speaker: TIME
text: I, that please some, try all—both joy and terror

speaker: TIME
text: Of good and bad, that makes and unfolds error—

speaker: TIME
text: Now take upon me, in the name of Time,

speaker: TIME
text: To use my wings. Impute it not a crime

speaker: TIME
text: To me or my swift passage that I slide

speaker: TIME
text: O’er sixteen years, and leave the growth untried

speaker: TIME
text: Of that wide gap, since it is in my power

speaker: TIME
text: To o’erthrow law and in one self-born hour

speaker: TIME
text: To plant and o’erwhelm custom. Let me pass

speaker: TIME
text: The same I am ere ancient’st order was

speaker: TIME
text: Or what is now received. I witness to

speaker: TIME
text: The times that brought them in. So shall I do

speaker: TIME
text: To th’ freshest things now reigning, and make stale

speaker: TIME
text: The glistering of this present, as my tale

speaker: TIME
text: Now seems to it. Your patience this allowing,

speaker: TIME
text: I turn my glass and give my scene such growing

speaker: TIME
text: As you had slept between. Leontes leaving,

speaker: TIME
text: Th’ effects of his fond jealousies so grieving

speaker: TIME
text: That he shuts up himself, imagine me,

speaker: TIME
text: Gentle spectators, that I now may be

speaker: TIME
text: In fair Bohemia. And remember well

speaker: TIME
text: I mentioned a son o’ th’ King’s, which Florizell

speaker: TIME
text: I now name to you, and with speed so pace

speaker: TIME
text: To speak of Perdita, now grown in grace

speaker: TIME
text: Equal with wond’ring. What of her ensues

speaker: TIME
text: I list not prophesy; but let Time’s news

speaker: TIME
text: Be known when ’tis brought forth. A shepherd’s daughter

speaker: TIME
text: And what to her adheres, which follows after,

speaker: TIME
text: Is th’ argument of Time. Of this allow,

speaker: TIME
text: If ever you have spent time worse ere now.

speaker: TIME
text: If never, yet that Time himself doth say

speaker: TIME
text: He wishes earnestly you never may.
